content.en:
"If it had been a long time ago, the Fourth Realm could have been broken!"

The Qinya Realm Lord smiled bitterly: "But now it doesn't work!"

"Why?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Because of the Wumu Realm Lord!" the Qinya Realm Lord explained: "The Wumu Realm Lord is actually from our side, he is very demonic, after passing from this side, he practiced all the way, and finally achieved the Sixth Realm, swept through the Four Thousand Territory, destroyed many forces, and offended many forces. After that, the Lord of the Wumu Realm was severely damaged on the side of the Three Thousand Territory, and finally fell shortly after his return. As soon as the lord of the Wumu Realm died, many forces were worried that such a demon would appear on our side again, so they cut off contact, and a lot of resources were not given to us, and even arranged formations to strengthen the boundary extradimensional barriers, making it difficult for us to pass through the fourth realm, and if we wanted to pass, we had to pay very expensive resources. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

The Qinya Realm Lord said again: "And when we enter the Fourth Realm over there, it is easy to be targeted, and if we walk around, it is easy to be besieged and killed." Basically, we will all pay some price, seek the protection of some forces, and stay in the territory of those forces, and we will not be intercepted and killed. Of course, even so, we still have a very difficult time. So, I don't want to leave the territory of 5000 unless I have to. "

After that, the Qinya Realm Lord introduced some more information, and also introduced Ye Tian to a force that could seek refuge-Snow Mountain Alliance.

The Snow Mountain Alliance has three Fifth Realms, and its strength is still very strong, and it only needs to pay some price to stay in the territory of the Snow Mountain Alliance.

However, Ye Tian refused.

If you really seek the protection of the Snow Mountain Alliance, you will inevitably be stared at by the Snow Mountain Alliance, and it will be inconvenient for you to take any action.

That's why he didn't agree.

......

Not long after, Ye Tian left from the Qinya Realm Lord.

At this point, he had already made a decision.

He wouldn't leave from the Four Elephant Realm Gate, nor would he choose to wait for the multidimensional tides.

"I have to leave from the corridor of the sword, so that I won't be targeted, and it won't be easy to attract attention~!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

He also had one more thing, and that was to relocate a group of Terrans to occupy a territory here.

The territory of the 5,000th Territory has almost been divided, and if he forcibly participates and grabs pieces of territory, it will naturally be no problem.

However, he still wanted to occupy an entire extradimensional territory to accommodate more Terrans.

"Then choose Territory 5311. "

This extradimensional territory is the territory of the Black Kite Realm Lord and many extradimensional creatures, but the Black Kite Realm Lord was killed by him, and if he cleared up some extradimensional creatures, he could easily occupy this extradimensional territory.

When the time comes, it is undoubtedly the best choice to use this extradimensional territory as a new foundation for the human race, and then do some business in the 5000th territory, and slowly radiate to the past.

And so this day.

Ye Tian came to the territory of No. 5311 alone and launched a frenzied slaughter.

Some third-realm extradimensional creatures were killed by him, and they were collected in a multi-dimensional treasure bottle to cultivate multi-dimensional essences, which were of no use to him, but were of great help to other races.

After a while, the place was almost cleaned up, and the remaining extradimensional creatures were not much of a threat to the Terrans.

Then.

He had just begun to relocate the Terrans, and for this he had even purchased a large number of treasure ships, each of which had reached the level of a high-level extradimensional soldier.

Terran.

Tens of thousands of treasure ships were brought over by Ye Tian, and a large number of Terran powerhouses poured into these treasure ships, and rushed to the territory of No. 5311 through these treasure ships.

And this move naturally attracted the attention of many secondary realms in the Six Thousand Territory.

One by one, the eyes of the Second Realm pierced through the void and looked at the many treasure ships that were roaming in the Void of Death, all of them dumbfounded.

"With so many high-level super-dimensional Dao Soldier-level treasure ships, which overlord-level force in the Five Thousand Territory is this?"

"It's not the overlord-level extradimensional force of the 5000th Territory, you look at the logo on the treasure ship, it's obviously the symbol of the human race. "

"This is the treasure ship of the human race, so many treasure ships, how many super dimensional dao coins are worth here!"

"What are the Terrans doing?

"Many forces do business with the Terrans, so they should know some secrets, right?"

"I inquired about it, the Terran is relocating some of its elites to the territory of No. 500!"

"That's right, the Terrans now have some third realms, and there are a lot of second realms, and the resources on our side can't supply the Terrans at all, so it's normal for them to move some of them. "

"It's okay to relocate, otherwise even if there is anything good on our side, it will be seized by the Terrans, if they completely relocate and abandon here, it will be better!"

"This is the ancestral land of the Terrans, they can't give it up, no matter how much they will leave a part of the Terrans. "

At the time of these second realm discussions, tens of thousands of Terran treasure ships had already torn apart the boundary extradimensional barrier leading to the 4,000 Territory of the 6,000 Territory.

And along the way, no extradimensional creature or extradimensional creature race dared to attack the Terran treasure fleet, and anyone could see that this was not an ordinary force, and daring to attack here was undoubtedly death.

And Ye Tian's copy body is still in the treasure ship fleet, even if the fourth realm attacks, he can bombard it as soon as possible.

It didn't take long.

The Terran treasure fleet arrived at the territory of 5311, and then a large number of Terran extradimensional realms began to transform the extradimensional realms here.

There are tens of thousands of extradimensional realms in the territory of 5311, and each of them is very large, far exceeding the extradimensional realm on the other side of the 60000 territory, but many extradimensional realms have been transformed into nests by extradimensional creatures, and some are not suitable for the human race.

So, we need to reinvent it.

Ye Tian didn't need to worry about these tasks, he just let the extradimensional realms of the human race deal with it.

......

Jiucai Chamber of Commerce.

The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm knew about the situation in the territory of 5311, and he also knew that the Terrans had moved there, but he didn't care too much.

After all, it's just a new Fourth Realm, and the Terrans who only have a Fourth Realm are not worth their attention.

Moreover, the Six Shadows Realm Lord did not doubt Ye Tian's identity, nor did he think that the Terran who had only cultivated for such a short time would have the strength to kill several Fourth Realms and the Black Kite Realm Lord, but he only felt that the Terran knew that the Black Kite Realm Lord had fallen, so he wanted to occupy the territory of No. 5,311.

And Ye Tian is not afraid of speculation from the outside world, with his current strength, it is enough to solve these troubles.

Afterwards.

A copy of Ye Tian's body is ready to go to the Sword Corridor and leave the Five Thousand Territory from the Sword Corridor.
